title: Neon Snake
description: Navigate the glowing neon grid, eat pixels, grow longer, and avoid crashing into walls or yourself.
instructions: Use WASD or Arrow Keys to change directions. Eat the red pixels to grow and score points.

title: Hyper Pong
description: A high-speed, modern take on the classic table tennis arcade game. Battle a smart AI opponent.
instructions: Use your Mouse cursor or Touch to move your paddle up and down. Deflect the ball past the AI.

title: Brick Buster
description: Destroy layers of colorful blocks by bouncing a ball off a slider. Catch falling power-ups to clear levels.
instructions: Move your Mouse or Touch to move the paddle left and right. Bounce the ball to destroy all bricks.

title: Floppy Bird
description: Tap or click to flap your wings and navigate through dangerous pipes. Keep a steady beat to score high.
instructions: Press Spacebar, Up Arrow, or Click to flap upwards. Avoid hitting the green columns.

title: Cosmic Defender
description: Defend Earth from continuous rows of hostile alien invaders in this vintage high-octane space shoot'em up.
instructions: Use Left/Right arrow keys or Mouse to move. Press Spacebar or Click to shoot laser beams.

title: Quantum Mines
description: A refined logical puzzle. Uncover blank squares on the minefield while flagging dangerous hidden coordinates.
instructions: Left-click to reveal a cell. Right-click or hold Ctrl to place a caution flag. Avoid detonation.

title: 2048 Legends
description: Merge identical numbers sequentially on an elegant grid to compound your score and manifest the ultimate 2048 tile.
instructions: Use WASD or Arrow Keys to slide numbers in any grid direction. Matching numbers combine when merged.

title: Hextris Revolution
description: A fast-paced combination of matching colors and spatial rotation. Match color rings to stave off the expanding hexagon.
instructions: Rotate utilizing the Arrow keys or Tap the sides. Match three or more segments of adjacent similar colors.
